WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS cons
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
seg_tot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN cons ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN cons ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012
    FROM seg_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons2013 - cons2012) / NULLIF(cons2013,0)) * 100 AS pct_increase
    FROM seg_tot
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase, 'biggest' AS type
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase, 'lowest' AS type
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT disp.account_id, (ma.max_avg - m.min_avg) AS gap
FROM disp
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
) o ON client.birth_date = o.oldest_date
JOIN (
    SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS min_avg
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_date
        FROM client
        WHERE gender = 'F'
    ) o2 ON c.birth_date = o2.oldest_date
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
) m ON district.A11 = m.min_avg
JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(d.A11) AS max_avg
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
) ma;	----- bird -----	financial
